text_block_list.text: One day, after heading to the roof to relax...
I hear what sounds like Seiun Sky groaning.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A-as you can see, I'm just doing some vocal
exercises!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ow ow ow! Whenever I do that, my head starts
hurting!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But it's nothing to worry about. Nya-ha... ha...

Despite what she says, Seiun Sky's headache
really seems to be bothering her. We probably
shouldn't ignore it.
